WITH youngest_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM client
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client)
),
client_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT d.client_id, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM disp d
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE t.type = 'PRIJEM' AND t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' -- Assuming 'PRIJEM' means credit/income
    GROUP BY d.client_id
),

WITH youngest_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id, birth_date
    FROM client
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client)
),
youngest_with_disp AS (
    SELECT d.account_id
    FROM youngest_clients yc
    JOIN disp d ON yc.client_id = d.client_id
),

WITH youngest_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM client
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client)
),
youngest_accounts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.account_id
    FROM youngest_clients yc
    JOIN disp d ON yc.client_id = d.client_id
),
income_by_account AS (
    SELECT account_id, AVG(amount) AS avg_income
    FROM trans
    WHERE type = 'Příjem'
    GROUP BY account_id
),
max_income AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_income) AS max_avg_income
    FROM income_by_account
)
